title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down a four-pillar AI system used by entrepreneur Alex Hormozi: data as competitive advantage, voice-first design philosophy, workflow decomposition, and compounding effects. The analysis includes a cautionary note about a workflow mistake that prompted a company-wide memo from Leila Hormozi at Acquisition.com.
